comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-002 (medium, acceptance-first). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/agent-model-routing.tests.sh (0 failed; internal assertions run silently and the suite prints a single summary line on success -- specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-002/focused-tests.log) and the epic-159-pillar-c cross-suite regression set (all six T-001..T-006 suites, both bash and pwsh lanes, 0 failed suites; specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-002/regression.log). NOTE: tests/agent-model-routing.tests.sh now contains the full REQ-002/REQ-005 case list (T-005 landed after T-002 in this repository's current HEAD), so this gate run necessarily exercises more than T-002's own Phase-1-scoped smoke subset; T-002's own scope per tasks.md is TEST-006..013/053/054 only, all of which are included and green. Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build) for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files plus the new docs/adr/0012 Markdown ADR. Per the implementation report (reports/implementation/epic-159-pillar-c/T-002.md): one disclosed specification-reading decision, not a deviation -- AC-054's risk_effort_matrix malformed-category fixture uses the unambiguous 'non-string value' sub-variant rather than 'missing a key', because a missing matrix entry is a separately documented, tolerated fallback case (TEST-011/TEST-012), not an error. No unresolved items blocking this task's own scope.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files plus the new docs/adr/0012 Markdown ADR (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files plus the new docs/adr/0012 Markdown ADR.

No network or service integration is in scope beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise against the real, fixture-copied or fixture-driven scripts this task edits; no separate service-integration surface exists.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files plus the new docs/adr/0012 Markdown ADR.
No independently startable application/UI/service; this task's suite fully covers its own CLI/script surface via the focused and regression logs.

No baseline-behavior.md exists for this feature; this is not a refactor/bugfix task (differential-test-policy.md does not apply). The change is additive per design.md's API/Contract Plan; the saved red/green evidence and cross-suite regression set provide the applicable behavior comparison.
No user-facing UI surface; this task's Planned Files are contract/script/test/doc files only.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
